channel.title: Dirty Laundry
channel.description: Latest releases from Dirty Laundry on Dropout.tv

item.title: Non-Alcoholic Spagett
item.description:
Grant explains why a spagett is the perfect drink to have at 2pm.

Duration: 03:16

Tags: Dirty Laundry, grant o'brien, drinking, non-alcoholic, mocktails, DIY

item.title: Gimlet
item.description:
Grant shows how to make a proper, buttoned-up drink.

Duration: 02:46

Tags: Dirty Laundry, grant o'brien, drinking, alcohol, cocktails, DIY

item.title: Who Got Detained in a Foreign Country?
item.description:
2nd Try members Zach, Kwesi, Ash, and Keith drink gimlets and share too much.

Duration: 45:30

Tags: Dirty Laundry, lily du, grant o'brien, talk shows, competitions, drinking, never have i ever, embarrassing, terrible things, zach kornfeld, kwesi james, ash perez, keith habersberger, try guys

item.title: Grasshopper
item.description:
Grant shows how to make a drink that's tastier than a bug.

Duration: 02:51

Tags: Dirty Laundry, grant o'brien, drinking, alcohol, cocktails, DIY
